deadline_notes: Biennial. License number determines year: even-number → June 30 of even years (incl. 2026 ACTIVE); odd-number → June 30 of odd years.
notes: No self-study cap, no annual minimum, no carryover, no A&A mandate. Teaching cap: 40hr; articles/publications cap: 20hr. First-renewal proration: 80/70/60/50hr by quarter. $161 renewal fee.
